    "**Three files are needed to visualize SNV:**<br>\n",
    "\n",
    "**adatas:** Ratio and depth information of CMB * SNV in h5ad files<br>\n",
    "**coor:** Original cell coordinate file with 3 columns (cell, x, y) and no header<br>\n",
    "**cmb_info:** Cell CMB group annotation with 2 columns (cell, group) and no header"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "d379ad66-2cd0-4df4-b520-bbb50e00aa62",

    "Load and combine data"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "1b35210b-8c23-46b1-b277-f8faaa63d62c",

   "source": [
    "ad_ratio = ad.read_h5ad(\"Dataset1/unit_ratio.h5ad\")\n",
    "ad_depth = ad.read_h5ad(\"Dataset1/unit_depth.h5ad\")\n",
    "adata = combine_ratio_depth(ad_ratio, ad_depth)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "67fb1714-0250-46f3-b4bb-21fb9f47a809",

    "Load spot coordinates and respective CMB labels"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "57e05c78-28e5-42bb-860b-b6f884119867",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "coor1 = pd.read_csv('Dataset1/cells_coor.csv', header = None, names = ['cell', 'x', 'y'], index_col = 0)\n",
    "cmb_info1 = pd.read_csv('Dataset1/cellmetabin.csv', header = None, names = ['cell', 'group'], index_col = 0)\n",
    "coor1[['x','y']] = coor1[['x','y']].apply(pd.to_numeric, errors='coerce')\n",
    "df1 = coor1.join(cmb_info1, how='inner')\n",
    "cmb_agg1 = df1.groupby('group').agg(x_center=('x','median'), y_center=('y','median'), n_cells=('x','size')).reset_index()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "c23999f6-3a4f-4adc-9821-a0b759375fe7",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Add aggregated coordinate informtaion to adata"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 9,
   "id": "9311201f-b4ad-4342-99bd-48b5e7188571",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "adata.obs = adata.obs.join(cmb_agg1.set_index('group')[['x_center','y_center','n_cells']], how='left')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "094c4dce-6e88-4802-a387-e3e76593405b",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### Perform visualization<br>\n",
    "\n",
    "**Cell colors can be adjusted with parameter \"group_colors\" in four ways:<br>**\n",
    "(1) Pass a dictionary (specify colors by group name): e.g. group_colors = {'A': 'red', 'B': 'green'}<br>\n",
    "(2) Pass a sequence of colors (assigned in order of appearance, looping if not already present): e.g. group_colors = ['red', 'green', 'orange']<br>\n",
    "(3) Pass a Matplotlib colormap name: e.g. group_colors = 'viridis'<br>\n",
    "(4) If not passed, 'tab20' is used by default"
   ]
  },
